name: xsolla-ai-kit
description: Xsolla agent skills toolkit — install the xsolla-ai-kit plugin to get guided, Xsolla-specific workflows from zero to a live game shop.

plugins.name: xsolla-ai-kit
plugins.description: All Xsolla workflow skills in one plugin: shop-setup (orchestrator), merchant-setup, catalog-design, login-setup, payments-config, webhooks-impl, store-build, and shop-design.
